name: Backend Final Gap Closure

workflow.notes: Tests validate workflow engine algorithms independently (DAG validation, topological sort, dependency resolution). These tests ensure correctness of core logic used by workflow_engine.py. Actual coverage increase requires integration tests that call WorkflowEngine methods directly.
workflow.coverage_note: No coverage increase because tests validate algorithms independently, not via WorkflowEngine class methods. Recommended follow-up: Add integration tests that execute workflows through WorkflowEngine.execute() to increase actual coverage.

next_steps: If target met: Proceed to Phase 128 (Backend API Contract Testing)

Add endpoint integration tests for all API routes (200+ tests needed)
Add service layer unit tests for core business logic (150+ tests needed)
Continue enforcing 80% coverage gate in CI
